name: Kindergarten Drawing & Illustration — Semester 1
description: An 18-week, play-based Kindergarten pathway for lines, shapes, observation, and drawing tools. Lessons are brief, hands-on, flexible, and designed for adult-guided learning.
learningGoals: Build confidence and curiosity with lines, shapes, observation, and drawing tools.
Communicate learning through talk, drawing, movement, play, or a simple creation.
Practice safe, kind, and responsible participation.

lessons.title: Notice and talk: lines, shapes, observation, and drawing tools
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about lines, shapes, observation, and drawing tools through a close look at lines, shapes, observation, and drawing tools.

lessons.title: Try it together: lines, shapes, observation, and drawing tools
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about lines, shapes, observation, and drawing tools through a guided practice with lines, shapes, observation, and drawing tools.

lessons.title: Make or show: lines, shapes, observation, and drawing tools
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about lines, shapes, observation, and drawing tools through a small creation or demonstration about lines, shapes, observation, and drawing tools.

lessons.objective: I can try a skill, use materials safely, and explain something I learned about lines, shapes, observation, and drawing tools through a close look at lines, shapes, observation, and drawing tools.

resources.title: National Core Arts Standards
resources.description: Planning reference for this Kindergarten Drawing & Illustration pathway.

units.title: Wonder and notice: lines, shapes, observation, and drawing tools
units.essentialQuestion: What can we notice and wonder about lines, shapes, observation, and drawing tools?
outcomes: I can notice details and share a question about lines, shapes, observation, and drawing tools.
I can use words, pictures, movement, or materials to communicate my thinking.

lessons.title: Notice and talk: lines, shapes, observation, and drawing tools
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about lines, shapes, observation, and drawing tools through a close look at lines, shapes, observation, and drawing tools.

activities.title: A close look at lines, shapes, observation, and drawing tools
activities.learnerAction: With an adult or teacher nearby when needed, the learner participates in a close look at lines, shapes, observation, and drawing tools, uses words, pictures, movement, or materials to communicate thinking, and cleans up safely.

successCriteria: The learner participates safely and respectfully in lines, shapes, observation, and drawing tools.
The learner communicates one observation, choice, or question using speech, drawing, movement, or a supported response.
